hero.title: Concept Explainer
hero.description: Break difficult ideas into clear explanation steps and review checks you create manually.

differences.title: Gradual understanding without AI in V1
differences.description: Concept Explainer V1 keeps learning structured and intentionally manual.

items.title: Concept first
items.description: Capture the topic and the core idea you want to understand.

items.title: Step-by-step clarity
items.description: Split the explanation into manageable pieces you can review in order.

items.title: Manual checks
items.description: Add simple questions and expected answers to test your understanding.

feel.title: A small workspace for difficult topics
feel.description: The experience keeps attention on one concept, its explanation steps, and review checks.

items.title: Start with the title
items.description: Name the concept and define the topic area.

items.title: Build the explanation
items.description: Add concise steps that make the idea easier to follow.

items.title: Review deliberately
items.description: Use check questions before marking the concept reviewed.

audiences.title: Who uses Concept Explainer
audiences.description: Useful whenever a topic needs a clearer starting point.

items.title: Students
items.description: Break difficult subjects into smaller explanation steps.

items.title: Self learners
items.description: Create reusable notes for unfamiliar concepts.

items.title: Professionals
items.description: Turn new work concepts into reviewable learning notes.

resourceSection.title: Learning explanation essentials
resourceSection.description: Keep the concept, steps, and checks together as one reviewable record.

items.title: Concept record
items.description: Store the title, topic, and short context.

items.title: Explanation steps
items.description: Add the ordered pieces that explain the idea.

items.title: Check questions
items.description: Create simple prompts and expected answers for review.

groupedSection.title: A simple learning workflow
groupedSection.description: Move from rough understanding to a reviewed concept in a short flow.

items.name: Concept
items.description: Add the topic you want to learn.

items.name: Steps
items.description: Write the explanation in clear ordered parts.

items.name: Questions
items.description: Add manual checks for the important points.

items.name: Reviewed
items.description: Mark the concept reviewed when you are ready.

technicalSection.title: Built as a foundation mini app
technicalSection.description: Concept Explainer follows the shared Ansiversa mini-app architecture.
items: No AI, external APIs, or quiz engine in V1.

finalCta.title: Ready to explain a concept?
finalCta.description: Open Concept Explainer and start with the topic you want to understand.
